title: selaginella umbrosa
intro: Selaginella umbrosa, also known as Spikemoss or Umbrella Fern, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and ability to thrive in humid environments. Traditionally, Selaginella umbrosa has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are said to aid in treating various health issues such as arthritis, digestive problems, and respiratory conditions. The plant's extracts are believed to have health benefits like improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting skin health. Selaginella umbrosa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
